forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures between 11 and 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning frost. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the evening. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 14.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of frost near the eastern border in the early morning. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of frost in the north in the early morning. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning frost in the west. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower near the eastern border, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 14.
Partly cloudy. Patches of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. The chance of fog and frost in the morning. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures between 11 and 15.
Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures between 11 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog east of Ceduna. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the south. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower about the Gammon Ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Patches of frost and the chance of fog south of Leigh Creek in the morning. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
